verificationResults.summary: All 56 focused pilot-evidence and MCP contract tests passed.
The full gate passed with 817 tests, 8 strict audits, 766 packaged files, warning-free docs, and installed-bin plus one-shot package smoke.

observations.summary: This transport-only change has no rendered interface; no new accessibility behavior was exercised.
This transport-only change has no viewport-dependent behavior; no responsive check was applicable.
Browser rendering was outside this MCP transport slice; the prior Website Console browser evidence remains unchanged.
A fresh stdio MCP process returned an explicit 452,923-byte full overflow and a 4,021-byte compact result with matching source hashes, byte counts, metrics, and claim boundaries.
